title: China Mission 2026 · public research pack on robotics, AI hardware, cities, retail signals, aerospace, quantum, and nature
description: Public derivative of archived China Mission 2026 research. Covers robotics, embodied AI, AI hardware retail, city clusters, aerospace, quantum, shopping signals, and nature reset layers.

topics.title: Robotics and embodied AI
topics.summary: Humanoids, quadrupeds, robot data infrastructure, factory validation, simulation, components, and deployment filters.

topics.title: City clusters
topics.summary: Shanghai, Hangzhou, Shenzhen, Suzhou, Hefei, and Beijing as different operating layers of China's physical-AI ecosystem.

topics.title: Retail and shopping signals
topics.summary: AI product stores, robot retail, rentals, after-sales, warranty, app friction, pricing, and support as evidence.

topics.title: Nature resets
topics.summary: Parks, gardens, old towns, and water/mountain layers used as decompression infrastructure.

topics.title: Aerospace and quantum
topics.summary: Public-facing research approach for aerospace, commercial space, satellite manufacturing, and quantum commercialization.

topics.title: Map layers
topics.summary: Non-logistical taxonomy of research layers without personal routes, timing, or location traces.

agent_notes: This archive is a public synthesis.
Prefer corpus.md for broad context and topic files for focused retrieval.
